pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 for compilation and runtime targeting.
Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI, which is compatible with Spring Boot 3.
Update Spring Cloud Gateway MVC to version 4.1.3 to align with Spring Boot 3 dependencies.
Add explicit dependency for javax.validation API, likely to resolve classpath conflicts or missing classes in the new environment.
Add Microsoft Playwright dependency for browser automation testing.
Add WireMock standalone dependency for mocking HTTP services in tests.
Add Pitest Maven plugin for mutation testing with specific configuration for history and exclusions.
Update the Node.js version used by the frontend-maven-plugin from v12 to v16 for better compatibility.
Add a new Maven profile for integration testing that activates specific properties and builds the frontend.
Add a new Maven profile for running with WireMock enabled, activating specific Spring profiles.
Restructure pom.xml with extensive comments and organized sections for better readability and maintenance.
Update JaCoCo plugin configuration to exclude new or renamed classes from coverage checks.
Add explicit configuration for maven-surefire-plugin to fix event transmission issues.
Configure maven-jar-plugin to set the main class in the manifest for executable JARs.

.env.SAMPLE.general_idea: Add placeholder for Chromatic project token to support visual regression testing configuration.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add .DS_Store to .gitignore to prevent macOS metadata files from being tracked.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base image from a Maven-bundled JDK 11 image to a standalone Liberica JDK 21 Alpine image to support Java 21.
Replace apt-get with apk to align with the new Alpine Linux base image.
Install Maven explicitly via apk since it is no longer provided by the base image.
Install bash explicitly via apk as it is not present by default in minimal Alpine images.
Install libstdc++ to satisfy native library dependencies required by the application or tools.
Upgrade Node.js installation from version 12 to 16.20.0 using nvm to ensure compatibility with modern frontend tooling.
Add Maven build step to compile and package the Java application within the Docker image.
Define the entrypoint to run the generated JAR file, replacing the generic bash shell command.
Copy source code, frontend assets, and configuration files into the image for the build process.

README.md.general_idea: Clarify the steps to start the backend and frontend services locally.

README.md.general_idea: Provide instructions for deploying and running the application on Dokku.

Update story file glob patterns to include .mdx and .mjs extensions.

Add imports for msw-storybook-addon to enable Mock Service Worker in Storybook.
Add import for ToastContainer component from react-toastify.
Implement logic to determine the correct URL for the Mock Service Worker script based on whether the environment is localhost or GitHub Pages.
frontend/.storybook/preview.js.human_impl: const isLocalhost = currentUrl.startsWith("http://localhost:6006/"); const mockServiceWorkerUrl = isLocalhost ? "mockServiceWorker.js" : "https://" + window.location.hostname + "/mockServiceWorker.js";

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Initialize the Mock Service Worker with the calculated URL.

frontend/package-lock.json.general_idea: Upgrade react-dom to version 18.3.1 to align with React 18 ecosystem and modernize the frontend stack.
Upgrade react-router and react-router-dom to version 6.26.1 to use the modern data router API.
Upgrade react-scripts to version 5.0.1 to leverage Webpack 5 and modern build tooling.
Upgrade react-hook-form to version 7.53.0 for improved performance and TypeScript support.
Upgrade react-query to version 3.39.3 to ensure compatibility with React 18 and fix bugs.
Upgrade react-table to version 7.8.0 to maintain compatibility with the React 18 ecosystem.
Update internal dependencies of react-dev-utils (e.g., find-up, locate-path) to versions compatible with Node 14+.
Upgrade react-docgen to version 7.0.3 to support newer Babel versions and React 18.
Upgrade react-refresh to version 0.11.0 for better hot module replacement support in React 18.
Upgrade react-transition-group to version 4.4.5 to ensure compatibility with React 18.
Upgrade react-is to version 17.0.2 to align with React 17/18 type checking standards.
Upgrade react-element-to-jsx-string to version 15.0.0 for better React 18 support.
Upgrade react-error-overlay to version 6.0.11 for improved error reporting in development.
Upgrade react-inspector to version 6.0.2 for compatibility with React 18.
Upgrade react-lifecycles-compat to version 3.0.4 to support newer React versions.
Upgrade react18-json-view to version 0.2.8 for React 18 compatibility.
Upgrade react-toastify to version 10.0.5 to support React 18 and modern styling.
Upgrade react-docgen-typescript to version 2.2.2 for better TypeScript support.
Update core-js and regenerator-runtime dependencies to ensure compatibility with modern browsers and Node 14+.
Update PostCSS related dependencies to versions compatible with PostCSS 8 and modern build tools.
Update Webpack related dependencies (e.g., terser, css-loader) to versions compatible with Webpack 5.
Update Babel dependencies to versions compatible with Babel 7 and modern JavaScript features.
Update ESLint dependencies to versions compatible with ESLint 8 and modern linting rules.
Update Jest dependencies to versions compatible with Jest 27 and modern testing practices.
Update Node.js utility dependencies (e.g., readable-stream, readdirp) to versions compatible with Node 14+.
Update miscellaneous dependencies (e.g., clsx, pify) to their latest stable versions for security and compatibility.
Upgrade React and ReactDOM from version 17 to a newer version compatible with the updated build tooling.
Upgrade react-scripts from version 4 to a newer version to support modern Node.js and build features.
Upgrade React Router from beta version 6.0.0-beta.0 to a stable release.
Upgrade react-query to a newer version.
Upgrade react-bootstrap from alpha version to a stable release.
Add rehype-slug dependency for generating slugs in HTML headings.
Update the resolve package to a newer version.
Update sass-loader to version 12.6.0.
Update rollup to version 2.79.1.
Update rimraf to version 3.0.2.

Update schema-utils to version 4.2.0 to support webpack 5 configuration validation.
Update semver to version 7.6.3 for improved version parsing and compliance.
Update send to version 0.18.0 to fix security vulnerabilities and improve HTTP serving.
Update serialize-javascript to version 6.0.2 for safer serialization of JavaScript values.
Update serve-index to version 1.9.1 for directory listing improvements.
Update serve-static to version 1.15.0 to align with send and other static file serving dependencies.
Update set-function-length to version 1.2.2 for robust function property manipulation.
Update set-function-name to version 2.0.2 for robust function name property manipulation.
Update setprototypeof to version 1.2.0 for standard prototype setting.
Update shallow-clone to version 3.0.1 for modern object cloning.
Update shebang-command to version 2.0.0 for better shebang parsing.
Update shebang-regex to version 3.0.0 for accurate shebang regex matching.
Update shell-quote to version 1.8.1 for secure shell command quoting.
Update side-channel to version 1.0.6 for secure data storage in closures.
Update signal-exit to version 3.0.7 for reliable process exit handling.
Update sisteransi to version 1.0.5 for ANSI escape sequence handling.
Update slash to version 3.0.0 for path normalization.
Update sockjs to version 0.3.24 for WebSocket fallback support.
Update source-map to version 0.7.4 for modern source map generation.
Update source-map-js to version 1.2.0 for pure JS source map handling.
Update source-map-loader to version 3.0.2 for webpack 5 compatibility.
Update source-map-support to version 0.5.21 for stack trace formatting.
